word: have a positive / negative impact on
vietnamese: có tác động tích cực / tiêu cực đến
example: Social media has a negative impact on young people's mental health.

vietnamese: dẫn đến hậu quả nghiêm trọng
example: Deforestation results in serious consequences for the environment.

vietnamese: đóng góp vào sự phát triển
example: Education contributes to the development of society.
Young people need to learn how to deal with stress.
We should raise awareness about environmental protection.
The government should take measures to reduce pollution.
